title: Add SEO meta tags to all pages

requirements.text: Update frontend/index.html to include a descriptive page title ('Coal & Curry | Authentic Chettinad Restaurant'), a meta description summarizing the restaurant, relevant keywords meta tag, Open Graph tags (og:title, og:description, og:type, og:url, og:image), and Twitter Card meta tags so the site is discoverable and renders rich previews when shared.
acceptanceCriteria: index.html contains a <title> tag with 'Coal & Curry | Authentic Chettinad Restaurant'
index.html contains a <meta name='description'> tag with a concise restaurant description
index.html contains <meta name='keywords'> with relevant terms (Chettinad, biryani, restaurant, etc.)
index.html contains Open Graph tags: og:title, og:description, og:type, og:url, og:image
index.html contains Twitter Card tags: twitter:card, twitter:title, twitter:description

requirements.text: Ensure the existing SEOHead component (frontend/src/components/seo/SEOHead.tsx) is used on every page (Home, About, Menu, Offers, Gallery, Blog, Contact, Reservation, Loyalty) with accurate, unique page-level title, meta description, canonical URL, Open Graph, and Twitter Card values tailored to each page's content.
acceptanceCriteria: Every public page (Home, About, Menu, Offers, Gallery, Blog, Contact, Reservation, Loyalty) renders an <SEOHead> component with a unique title and description
Each page's title follows the pattern '[Page Name] | Coal & Curry'
Each page's meta description is unique and accurately describes that page's content
Canonical URLs are set per page using the coalandcurry.com domain
Open Graph and Twitter Card tags are populated on every page

requirements.text: Verify and update the existing robots.txt (frontend/public/robots.txt) and sitemap.xml (frontend/public/sitemap.xml) to ensure all public pages are included with accurate URLs (using the canonical domain), correct priorities, and up-to-date lastmod dates so Google can crawl and index the site efficiently.
acceptanceCriteria: robots.txt references the correct sitemap URL
sitemap.xml lists all 9 public pages with valid canonical URLs
No public pages are accidentally blocked in robots.txt

constraints: Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui
Cart and Checkout pages must remain noindex as currently implemented
Use the existing SEOHead component — do not create a duplicate SEO mechanism
nonGoals: Google Search Console setup or submission (manual step for the user)
Google Business Profile or Google Maps listing
Structured data changes beyond what SEOHead already supports
